requirement_topic.en: NEA Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Seasonal Grid Balancing Context
requirement_topic.zh: NEA BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及季节性电网调峰背景
requirement_topic.zht: NEA BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及季節性電網調峰背景

summary.en: NEA (Nepal Electricity Authority) is the sole integrated electricity utility in Nepal, responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. All grid-connected BESS installations require NEA technical review and grid-connection approval. Nepal's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — the same frequency as China but with a different nominal voltage (230/400 V versus China's 220/380 V). Nepal's hydro-dominant power system experiences significant seasonal variability: dry-season (November–April) generation deficits and wet-season (May–October) surpluses, making grid-scale BESS relevant for inter-seasonal balancing and peak management. NEA references IEC standards in technical specifications; IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series — including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) — are the internationally expected standards for BESS grid-connection technical documentation. A comprehensive publicly accessible NEA technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific requirements must be obtained directly from NEA before equipment procurement is finalised.
summary.zh: NEA（尼泊尔电力局）是尼泊尔唯一的综合性电力公用事业机构，负责发电、输电和配电。所有并网BESS装置均须取得NEA技术审查和并网批准。尼泊尔电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同（230/400 V，而非中国的220/380 V）。尼泊尔以水电为主的电力系统存在显著的季节性波动：旱季（11月至4月）发电量不足，雨季（5月至10月）发电量过剩，使电网规模BESS在季节间调峰和负荷管理方面具有重要意义。NEA在技术规格中引用IEC标准；IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列——包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）——是BESS并网技术文件的国际预期标准。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认NEA公开发布专门针对BESS并网的综合技术规格；在设备采购最终确定前，须直接向NEA获取项目专属要求。
summary.zht: NEA（尼泊爾電力局）是尼泊爾唯一的綜合性電力公用事業機構，負責發電、輸電和配電。所有併網BESS裝置均須取得NEA技術審查和併網批准。尼泊爾電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同（230/400 V，而非中國的220/380 V）。尼泊爾以水電為主的電力系統存在顯著的季節性波動：旱季（11月至4月）發電量不足、雨季（5月至10月）發電量過剩，使電網規模BESS在季節間調峰和負荷管理方面具有重要意義。NEA在技術規格中引用IEC標準；IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列——包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）——是BESS併網技術文件的國際預期標準。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認NEA公開發布專門針對BESS併網的綜合技術規格；在設備採購最終確定前，須直接向NEA獲取項目專屬要求。

standards_or_laws: NEA (Nepal Electricity Authority) — sole grid operator; grid-connection approval mandatory for all grid-connected BESS in Nepal
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Nepal grid parameters: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA China)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Nepal's 230/400 V nominal voltage. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Nepal's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA中国）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与尼泊尔230/400 V标称电压不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对尼泊尔230/400 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA中國）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與尼泊爾230/400 V標稱電壓不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對尼泊爾230/400 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA China approvals do not satisfy Nepal NEA's grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Nepal is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Nepal's nominal voltage even though both grids operate at 50 Hz; (b) NEA project-specific connection requirements — engage Nepal NEA at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) seasonal grid context — BESS intended for Nepal grid-balancing applications should be sized and configured considering dry-season demand and wet-season surplus patterns; (e) AEPC mini-grid programs — for off-grid or mini-grid BESS, verify AEPC technical specifications and program eligibility requirements separately from NEA grid-connection rules.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和中国NEA审批不满足尼泊尔NEA的并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——尼泊尔为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；即使两国电网均运行于50 Hz，PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数仍须针对尼泊尔标称电压重新配置并重新测试；（b）NEA项目专属并网要求——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与尼泊尔NEA接触以获取技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）季节性电网背景——用于尼泊尔电网调峰的BESS须结合旱季用电需求和雨季过剩规律进行容量和配置设计；（e）AEPC微电网项目——对于离网或微电网BESS，须独立于NEA并网规则核实AEPC技术规格和项目资格要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和中國NEA審批不滿足尼泊爾NEA的併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——尼泊爾為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；即使兩國電網均運行於50 Hz，PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數仍須針對尼泊爾標稱電壓重新配置並重新測試；（b）NEA項目專屬併網要求——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與尼泊爾NEA接觸以獲取技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）季節性電網背景——用於尼泊爾電網調峰的BESS須結合旱季用電需求和雨季過剩規律進行容量和配置設計；（e）AEPC微電網項目——對於離網或微電網BESS，須獨立於NEA併網規則核實AEPC技術規格和項目資格要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEA grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Nepal; AEPC technical standards apply to subsidised off-grid and mini-grid programs
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA China grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Nepal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA China approvals do not satisfy Nepal NEA's grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Nepal's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid, even though both grids share the same frequency. Engage Nepal NEA at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements and applicable IEC 62933 evidence. For off-grid or mini-grid BESS, verify AEPC technical specifications and program eligibility separately. No comprehensive publicly accessible Nepal NEA technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct NEA engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和中国NEA审批不满足尼泊尔NEA的并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对尼泊尔230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置，即使两国电网频率相同。应在项目最早阶段与尼泊尔NEA接触，确定并网协议技术要求及适用IEC 62933证据。对于离网或微电网BESS，须另行核实AEPC技术规格和项目资格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认尼泊尔NEA公开发布专门针对BESS并网的综合技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与NEA接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和中國NEA審批不滿足尼泊爾NEA的併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對尼泊爾230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置，即使兩國電網頻率相同。應在項目最早階段與尼泊爾NEA接觸，確定併網協議技術要求及適用IEC 62933證據。對於離網或微電網BESS，須另行核實AEPC技術規格和項目資格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認尼泊爾NEA公開發布專門針對BESS併網的綜合技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與NEA接觸至關重要。
